name: Waena Inn Unit 12 – Newly Renovated Maui Private Suite
summary: Waena Inn Unit 12 – Newly Renovated Maui Private Suite
description:
Enjoy a cozy stay at this 324 sq ft modern Ohana studio apartment at Waena inn in Maui, featuring a small kitchenette and private bathroom. Large windows offer beautiful views of the West Maui Volcano and the warm Hawaiian breeze. With amenities such as A/C, Wi-Fi, smart TV, and free parking, it's centrally located where the west and east sides of Maui meet, Please note, this is not a resort or beachfront setting. Instead, it offers a more local, residential Maui experience—ideal for travelers who want a peaceful, authentic base while staying connected to all parts of the island. Centrally located where Maui’s west and east sides meet, you’ll have easy access to pristine beaches, local shops, and the airport just 10–15 minutes away. Whether you’re here to explore or simply unwind, this welcoming studio is the perfect home base for your Maui adventure.

Our space is designed to comfortably host Three guests, featuring a queen and twin xl bed but we can accommodate an extra guests with an Air Mattress upon request, there is an additional fee . Simply let us know ahead of time, and we’ll have it ready for your stay!**Please note: This unit is located on the ground level.**

Amenities A/C, Wi-Fi, Smart TV, Assigned free parking. Central location! Located in the heart of the island where west & east Maui meet. 10 to 15 minute drive to stunning beaches & airport.

Wailuku is a neighborhood located on the island of Maui in Hawaii.

Wailuku is a historic town with many buildings dating back to the 19th century. It has a diverse mix of residential and commercial areas, with a range of housing options from historic homes to newer developments.

The town is home to several parks and recreational areas, including the popular Iao Valley State Park, which features a scenic hike to the Iao Needle, a natural rock formation. The Wailuku River State Park also offers hiking trails and swimming holes.

Wailuku has a vibrant downtown area with shops, restaurants, and art galleries. The Maui Arts and Cultural Center is located nearby, offering a range of cultural events and performances.

Overall, Wailuku is a charming and historic neighborhood with plenty to offer both residents and visitors.

Getting around Wailuku, Maui is relatively easy, with several transportation options available:

Car rental: Renting a car is a popular option for visitors to Maui. There are several car rental companies located at the airport and in downtown Wailuku. Having a car gives you the freedom to explore the island at your own pace.

Public transportation: Maui's public transportation system, known as the Maui Bus, operates several routes throughout the island, including Wailuku. Fares are affordable, and the buses are air-conditioned and equip
ped with bike racks.

Taxis and ride-sharing services: Taxis and ride-sharing services like Uber and Lyft are also available on Maui. However, these options may be more expensive than renting a car or taking the bus.

Biking: Biking is a great way to explore Wailuku and the surrounding areas. There are several bike rental shops in Wailuku, and many roads have bike lanes.

Walking: Wailuku is a walkable town, with many shops, restaurants, and attractions located within easy walking distance of each other. Walking is a great way to get some exercise and explore the area at a leisurely pace.

Overall, there are several transportation options available for getting around Wailuku and Maui, allowing visitors to choose the option that best fits their needs and budget.

For your convenience, a washer and dryer are located on the property and may be used for a daily fee 5pm-6am( please note detergent not provided)

Guest parking is free with vehicle registration, and open parking is available for registered guests

We want your stay to be as smooth and worry-free as possible! For extra peace of mind, we recommend considering travel insurance to cover unexpected changes or emergencies. It’s completely optional, but it can help make your trip stress-free
